description: You are a Corporate Counsel reviewing a 'Service Level Agreement'. Generate a redline comparison between the original draft (/home/ga/Documents/contract_v1_original.odt) and the vendor's modified version (/home/ga/Documents/contract_v2_vendor.odt). Save this comparison document as /home/ga/Documents/contract_comparison.odt. Create a final resolved version by accepting the change to Payment Terms (to 45 days) and the added 'Force Majeure' clause, while rejecting the deletion of the 'Arbitration' clause and the change to 'Limitation of Liability' (maintaining the $1,000,000 limit). Save the final clean version as /home/ga/Documents/contract_final_resolved.odt.
